# PHASEEngine.UpdateMode.manual

**Case**

A mode that indicates the app controls when the framework adjusts state.

## Declaration

```swift
case manual
```

## Discussion

In this mode, the framework waits for the app to call [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEEngine/update()] before processing the app’s API calls and adjusting internal states.

## Modes

- **PHASEEngine.UpdateMode.automatic**: A mode that indicates PHASE sets the timing of state adjustments.
